description: Eval set for keel plugin hooks and skill behavior

evals.name: session-start-new
evals.expected_output: Hook exits 0 and creates session directory with state.json and memory.json
expectations: A new session directory is created under the project state dir
state.json contains session_id, oa_session_id, status=running, empty phase_list
memory.json contains null user_task, empty completed_phases

evals.name: session-start-resume-existing
evals.setup: Create an existing session with oa_session_id=test-oa-session-002
evals.expected_output: Hook exits 0 and updates oa_session_id on existing session
expectations: No new session directory is created

evals.name: prompt-submit-first-prompt

input.prompt: Fix the login bug in auth.ts

evals.setup: Create a session with null user_task and empty phase_list
evals.expected_output: Hook writes user_task to memory and outputs context with pending_classification
expectations: memory.json user_task is set to the prompt text
stdout JSON contains hookSpecificOutput with additionalContext

evals.name: prompt-submit-mid-phase
evals.setup: Create a session with severity=medium, phase_list=[investigate,plan,review_codex,implement_cc,verify], completed_phases=[investigate], user_task set
evals.expected_output: Hook outputs context showing current phase as 'plan' with relevant memory fields
expectations: additionalContext contains phase progression showing investigate as completed
Phase Data section includes user_task and investigation fields

evals.name: prompt-submit-orphan-session
evals.setup: Create a session with pending_choice=true and oa_session_id=test-oa-session-new
evals.expected_output: Hook outputs pending_choice context asking user to continue or start fresh
expectations: additionalContext contains done command option for starting fresh

evals.name: keel-sh-init-phases-medium
evals.setup: Create a session directory with state.json (empty phase_list) and memory.json
evals.expected_output: Phase list is set for medium severity
expectations: state.json phase_list contains investigate, plan, review_codex, implement_cursor or implement_cc, verify

evals.name: keel-sh-advance
evals.setup: Create a session with phase_list=[investigate,plan,...], completed_phases=[], current phase=investigate
evals.expected_output: Phase advances: investigation merged into memory, investigate added to completed_phases
expectations: memory.json investigation field is populated with the provided JSON

evals.name: keel-sh-jump
evals.setup: Create a session with completed_phases=[investigate, plan, review_codex]
evals.expected_output: Jump removes plan and subsequent phases from completed_phases
